response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates exceptional overall software engineering expertise with 15+ years of professional experience and proven senior-level capabilities, they lack the specific mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is minimal and dated (6 months in 2014-2015), there is no evidence of Windows platform proficiency (recent work is web/Linux-focused), no SQL Server or Oracle expertise is demonstrated, and critically, there is no financial services or capital markets domain knowledge. The candidate would require substantial retraining to become viable for this capital markets/fixed income role.
strengths: 15+ years professional software development with consistent staff/senior-level positions demonstrating technical depth and leadership
Strong proven communication and teaching abilities evidenced by conference talks, workshops, and knowledge-sharing initiatives
Solid CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure experience with GitLab, Docker, and deployment pipeline setup
concerns: Minimal C++ experience—only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015; no hands-on C++ work in the last decade; recent roles center on Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform; entire recent career focused on web, mobile, cross-platform, and Linux technologies
Complete absence of financial services, capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge; recent roles in direct mail automation, GIS, and web platforms
